abstract: Structured guidance for company Preact applications built with Vite and TypeScript that also rely on React-oriented libraries such as MUI, react-hook-form, lexical, and Zustand. The guide is optimized for agents and LLMs: short trigger instructions in SKILL.md, a compiled AGENTS.md for full review, and modular rule files grouped by priority and impact. Version 3.2 keeps company-specific guardrails while adapting several portable example blocks from vercel-react-best-practices instead of using legacy local code as the main best-practice source.
